summary: Great Virginia show highlighted by a rare Finiculi Finicula opener; recording quality not discussed.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as a pleasant night in a small Virginian town with everyone smiling and enjoying the music. The opening of "Finiculi Finicula," noted as a rare West LA second‑set starter, set an upbeat tone for what was called a great show. No specific comments about the audio source or quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: A single positive 4‑star review praises the performance but gives no insight into recording fidelity, leading to a solid yet cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening with the rare "Finiculi Finicula" created a upbeat vibe; overall the set was described as enjoyable and memorable.
